title: Pack of 12 Rubber Ducks Baby Bath Duck Toddler Bath Toys Hole-Free Sealed Bathtub Toys Pool Water Soft Floating Rubber Toy for 18M+
features: Safe and Fun for Baby - Our Rubber Ducks Bath Toys are specifically designed for toddlers aged 18 months and older, ensuring a safe bath time experience. Parents can rest easy knowing these baby bath toys are free from harmful materials and provide endless fun!

No Hole Design - Unlike traditional bath toys, our 12PCS no hole bath toys are sealed to prevent water from getting trapped inside. This innovative design makes them easy to clean and maintain, allowing you to enjoy stress-free bath times with your little one.

Soft and Easy to Grip - Made from soft, high-quality rubber, these toddler bath toys are perfect for small hands. Their smooth surfaces and vibrant colors not only enhance grip but also stimulate your baby's imagination during playtime, both in and out of the bathtub.

Versatile Bath Time Experiences - These rubber ducks are not just for bathtubs! They can also be used as pool toys, making them ideal for various water play scenarios. Make bath time enjoyable and versatile with these delightful characters your baby will adore.

Fun Animal Rubber Ducks - 12 rubber ducks, each in the shape of a different cute animal! Not only is it fun, but it is also educational, as children can learn and identify different animals while taking a bath. This is a perfect gift for children for Christmas, birthdays, and Easter!
